chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-01 / 2019 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY. 1) For hearing of CMA No. 03/2019. 2) For hearing of main case. 17.05.2024. Ms. Dil-Khurram Shaheen, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Aamir Raza, holding brief for Mr. Ghulam Murtaza, Advocate for Respondent. ________________ It appears that the controversy as raised in this matter in respect of Valuation as per Circular No. SI/Misc./13/2014-CC(Appr)/375 dated 22.11.2017 has already been decided by a Division Bench of this Court in the case Messrs Sky Overseas v. Federation of Pakistan and 4 Others (2019 PTD 1964). In view of such position, this Petition is also disposed on the same terms as contained in the above order. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
